---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# library(tidyverse)
# library(RMINC)
# library(ggalluvial)
# library(patchwork)
# library(MRIcrotome)
# library(grid)
# library(gridExtra)
# library(RColorBrewer)
# library(ggnewscale)
```

```{r}
PROJECTPATH <- Sys.getenv("PROJECTPATH")
SRCPATH <- Sys.getenv("SRCPATH")
```

```{r}
source(file.path(SRCPATH, "utils.R"))
source(file.path(SRCPATH, "processing.R"))
source(file.path(SRCPATH, "analysis.R"))
```

# Mouse clusters

```{r}
mouse_params_id <- "107"

mouse_pipeline_dir <- file.path(PROJECTPATH, "data/mouse/derivatives/v3/", mouse_params_id)

mouse_es_dir <- file.path(mouse_pipeline_dir, "effect_sizes", "200")
mouse_cluster_dir <- file.path(mouse_pipeline_dir, "clusters", "resolution_0.2")
mouse_centroid_dir <- file.path(mouse_pipeline_dir, "centroids", "resolution_0.05")

mouse_mask_file <- file.path(PROJECTPATH, "data/mouse/registration/reference_files", "scanbase_second_level-nlin-3_mask_200um.mnc")

mouse_clusters_file <- file.path(mouse_cluster_dir, "clusters.csv")
mouse_clusters <- read_csv(mouse_clusters_file)
```

```{r}
list_mouse_es <- vector(mode = "list", length = 2)
names(list_mouse_es) <- c("absolute", "relative")
for (i in 1:length(list_mouse_es)) {
  jacobians <- str_to_title(names(list_mouse_es)[i])
  
  es_files <- mouse_clusters %>% 
    pull(ID) %>% 
    str_replace(".mnc", paste0("_ES_", jacobians, "_200.mnc"))
  
  es_files <- file.path(mouse_es_dir, es_files)
  
  es_mat <- import_images(imgfiles = es_files,
                          mask = mouse_mask_file,
                          output_format = "matrix",
                          version = "v2")
  
  es_mat[is.nan(es_mat)] <- 0
  
  rownames(es_mat) <- mouse_clusters$ID
  
  list_mouse_es[[i]] <- es_mat
}

W <- similarity_network(x = list_mouse_es, metric = "correlation", K = 10,
                        sigma = 0.5, t = 20, outfile = NULL)

df_cluster_metrics <- estimate_cluster_metrics(W = W, NUMC = 2:10)
```

```{r}
sample_effect_sizes <- function(x, size = 0.8, replace = FALSE, seed = NULL){
  
  N <- nrow(x[[1]])
  n <- floor(size*N)
  if (!is.null(seed)) {set.seed(seed)}
  idx <- sample(1:N, size = n, replace = replace)
  x_sampled <- map(.x = x, .f = function(x){x[idx,]})
  
  return(x_sampled)
}


sample_snf_metrics <- function(x, size = 0.8, replace = FALSE, seed = NULL) {
  
  x_sampled <- sample_effect_sizes(x = x, size = size, replace = replace, seed = seed)
  W <- similarity_network(x = x_sampled, metric = "correlation", K = 10,
                          sigma = 0.5, t = 20, outfile = NULL)
  
  metrics <- estimate_cluster_metrics(W = W, NUMC = 2:10)
  
  return(metrics)
}


sample_ARI <- function(x, clusters, size = 0.8, replace = FALSE, seed = NULL) {
  
  x_sampled <- sample_effect_sizes(x = x, size = size, replace = replace, seed = seed)
  W_sampled <- similarity_network(x = x_sampled, metric = "correlation", K = 10,
                                  sigma = 0.5, t = 20, outfile = NULL)
  
  clusters_sampled <- create_clusters(W = W_sampled, nk = 10)
  clusters_sampled <- clusters_sampled %>% 
    arrange(ID)
  
  clusters <- clusters %>% 
    semi_join(clusters_sampled, by = "ID") %>% 
    arrange(ID)
  
  clusters_sampled <- clusters_sampled %>% 
    column_to_rownames("ID")
  
  clusters <- clusters %>% 
    column_to_rownames("ID")
  
  df_ARI <- tibble(nk = 2:10, ARI = 0)
  for (i in 1:nrow(df_ARI)) {
    nki <- df_ARI[[i, "nk"]]
    nk_col <- paste0("nk", nki)
    
    ARI <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(x = clusters[[nk_col]], y = clusters_sampled[[nk_col]])
    df_ARI[[i, "ARI"]] <- ARI
  }
  
  return(df_ARI)
  
}
```

```{r}
size <- 0.8
replace <- FALSE
nproc <- 4
B <- 500
# B <- 100

pb <- txtProgressBar(max = B, style = 3)
progress <- function(n) {
  setTxtProgressBar(pb = pb, value = n)
}

cl <- makeSOCKcluster(nproc)
registerDoSNOW(cl)
opts <- list(progress = progress)
list_snf_metrics <- foreach(
  i = 1:B,
  .packages = c("tidyverse", "SNFtool"),
  .options.snow = opts
) %dopar%
  {
    sample_snf_metrics(x = list_mouse_es, seed = i, size = 0.8, replace = FALSE)
  }
close(pb)
stopCluster(cl)
  
df_snf_metrics <- bind_rows(list_snf_metrics, .id = "seed")
```

```{r}
df_snf_metrics_summary <- df_snf_metrics %>% 
  group_by(nk) %>% 
  summarise(y = mean(eigengap), 
            lwr = quantile(eigengap, prob = 0.025),
            upr = quantile(eigengap, prob = 0.975)) %>% 
  ungroup() 


ggplot(df_snf_metrics, aes(x = nk, y = eigengap)) + 
  geom_line(mapping = aes(group = factor(seed)),
            alpha = 0.04) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.02) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df_snf_metrics_summary,
                  mapping = aes(y = y, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
                  col = "red") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.02)) + 
  labs(x = "Cluster solution (K)",
       y = "Spectral Clustering Eigengap") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
```

```{r}
nproc <- 4
B <- 500
# B <- 100

pb <- txtProgressBar(max = B, style = 3)
progress <- function(n) {
  setTxtProgressBar(pb = pb, value = n)
}

cl <- makeSOCKcluster(nproc)
registerDoSNOW(cl)
opts <- list(progress = progress)
list_ARI <- foreach(
  i = 1:B,
  .packages = c("tidyverse", "SNFtool"),
  .options.snow = opts
) %dopar%
  {
    sample_ARI(x = list_mouse_es, clusters = mouse_clusters, seed = i)
  }
close(pb)
stopCluster(cl)
  
df_ARI <- bind_rows(list_ARI, .id = "seed")
```

```{r}
df_ARI_summary <- df_ARI %>% 
  group_by(nk) %>% 
  summarise(y = mean(ARI), 
            lwr = quantile(ARI, prob = 0.025),
            upr = quantile(ARI, prob = 0.975)) %>% 
  ungroup() 


ggplot(df_ARI, aes(x = nk, y = ARI)) + 
  geom_line(mapping = aes(group = factor(seed)),
            alpha = 0.04) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.02) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df_ARI_summary,
                  mapping = aes(y = y, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
                  col = "red") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Cluster solution (K)",
       y = "Adjusted Rand Index") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
```

# POND+ clusters

```{r}
human_params_id <- "700"

human_pipeline_dir <- file.path(PROJECTPATH, "data/human/derivatives/v3/", human_params_id)

human_es_dir <- file.path(human_pipeline_dir, "effect_sizes", "resolution_3.0")
human_cluster_dir <- file.path(human_pipeline_dir, "clusters", "resolution_3.0")

human_clusters_file <- file.path(human_cluster_dir, "clusters.csv")
human_clusters <- read_csv(human_clusters_file)
```

```{r}
list_human_es <- vector(mode = "list", length = 2)
names(list_human_es) <- c("absolute", "relative")
for (i in 1:length(list_human_es)) {
  jacobians <- names(list_human_es)[i]
  
  es_file <- file.path(human_es_dir, jacobians, "effect_sizes.csv")
  
  df_es <- as_tibble(data.table::fread(es_file, header = TRUE))
  
  es_mat <- df_es %>% 
    column_to_rownames("file") %>% 
    as.matrix()
  
  list_human_es[[i]] <- es_mat
}

W <- similarity_network(x = list_human_es, metric = "correlation", K = 10,
                        sigma = 0.5, t = 20, outfile = NULL)

df_cluster_metrics <- estimate_cluster_metrics(W = W, NUMC = 2:10)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_cluster_metrics, aes(x = nk, y =eigengap)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.01)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.10))
```

```{r}
nproc <- 8
B <- 500
B <- 100

pb <- txtProgressBar(max = B, style = 3)
progress <- function(n) {
  setTxtProgressBar(pb = pb, value = n)
}

cl <- makeSOCKcluster(nproc)
registerDoSNOW(cl)
opts <- list(progress = progress)
list_snf_metrics_pond <- foreach(
  i = 1:B,
  .packages = c("tidyverse", "SNFtool"),
  .options.snow = opts
) %dopar%
  {
    sample_snf_metrics(x = list_human_es, seed = i)
  }
close(pb)
stopCluster(cl)
  
df_snf_metrics_pond <- bind_rows(list_snf_metrics_pond, .id = "seed")
```

```{r}
df_snf_metrics_pond_summary <- df_snf_metrics_pond %>% 
  group_by(nk) %>% 
  summarise(y = mean(eigengap), 
            lwr = quantile(eigengap, prob = 0.025),
            upr = quantile(eigengap, prob = 0.975)) %>% 
  ungroup() 


ggplot(df_snf_metrics_pond, aes(x = nk, y = eigengap)) + 
  geom_line(mapping = aes(group = factor(seed)),
            alpha = 0.04) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.02) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df_snf_metrics_pond_summary,
                  mapping = aes(y = y, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
                  col = "red") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.02)) + 
  labs(x = "Cluster solution (K)",
       y = "Spectral Clustering Eigengap") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
```

```{r}
nproc <- 6
# B <- 500
B <- 100

pb <- txtProgressBar(max = B, style = 3)
progress <- function(n) {
  setTxtProgressBar(pb = pb, value = n)
}

cl <- makeSOCKcluster(nproc)
registerDoSNOW(cl)
opts <- list(progress = progress)
list_ARI_pond <- foreach(
  i = 1:B,
  .packages = c("tidyverse", "SNFtool"),
  .options.snow = opts
) %dopar%
  {
    sample_ARI(x = list_human_es, clusters = human_clusters, seed = i)
  }
close(pb)
stopCluster(cl)
  
df_ARI_pond <- bind_rows(list_ARI_pond, .id = "seed")
```

```{r}
df_ARI_pond_summary <- df_ARI_pond %>% 
  group_by(nk) %>% 
  summarise(y = mean(ARI), 
            lwr = quantile(ARI, prob = 0.025),
            upr = quantile(ARI, prob = 0.975)) %>% 
  ungroup() 


ggplot(df_ARI_pond, aes(x = nk, y = ARI)) + 
  geom_line(mapping = aes(group = factor(seed)),
            alpha = 0.04) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.02) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df_ARI_pond_summary,
                  mapping = aes(y = y, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
                  col = "red") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Cluster solution (K)",
       y = "Adjusted Rand Index") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
```

```{r}
n <- 1000
x <- rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 1)
size <- 0.8

mu <- 0
xbar <- mean(x)

B <- 1000

means_subsampled <- numeric(B)
means_bootstrapped <- numeric(B)
for (b in 1:B) {
  
  set.seed(b)
  idx <- sample(1:n, size = floor(n*size), replace = FALSE)
  means_subsampled[b] <- mean(x[idx])
  
  set.seed(b)
  idx <- sample(1:n, size = n, replace = TRUE)
  means_bootstrapped[b] <- mean(x[idx])
  
}

df <- bind_rows(tibble(x = means_subsampled,
                       method = "subsampled"),
                tibble(x = means_bootstrapped,
                       method = "bootstrapped"))

df_summary <- df %>% 
  group_by(method) %>% 
  summarise(y = mean(x), 
            ymin = quantile(x, 0.025),
            ymax = quantile(x, 0.975)) %>% 
  ungroup()

ggplot(df, aes(x = method, y = x)) + 
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2, width = 0.2) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df_summary,
                  mapping = aes(y = y, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
                  col = "red") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = xbar, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.20, 0.20)) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
sd(x)/sqrt(n)
```

```{r}
df_summary
```

```{r}
xbar <- mean(x)
m <- floor(n*size)

d <- sqrt(m) * (means_subsampled - xbar)   # approximates distribution of sqrt(n)(xbar - mu)

q <- quantile(d, c(0.025, 0.975))

CI <- xbar - q / sqrt(n)   # CI for mu
CI
```
